name: 撩妹模拟器：渣男的秘密
slug: 撩妹模拟器渣男的秘密
short_description: During the pursuit of six beautiful women, you will learn the underlying logic and basic principles of love, chat skills, dating skills, relationship upgrade skills, psychological effects of love, and building framework personality attraction.
detailed_description:
The game reveals the unknown secret of super seducer, allowing you to learn the skills and thinking of super seducer and truly make girls fall in love with you. The core idea of the game is consistent with the real love idea, that is, women are attracted, not pursued.

Game Features
This game truly teaches flirting skills, including the underlying logic of love, chat skills, dating skills, psychological effects, attraction construction, etc.

There is an emotional counselor in the game, who will provide comments, analysis, and guidance when you make important choices, allowing you to gradually learn how to flirt with girls

The game features 6 beauties, all of whom have real-life backgrounds. The pursuit levels range from easy to difficult, and the storyline and dialogue are mostly derived from real-life scenarios, allowing you to learn how to date girls in the real world.
